name: Fuxue QiuGuo Hotel (Nanluoguxiang Siheyuan)
notes: Traditional siheyuan at 114 Jiaodaokou South Street, Dongcheng. Walking distance to Nanluoguxiang, Drum Tower, Houhai and Lama Temple. Courtyard layout with modern rooms; highly rated. Book on Booking.com or Trip.com.

name: Mercure Xi'an Downtown
notes: Near Bell Tower and Muslim Quarter, within 10–15 min walk of city wall and metro. Free airport shuttle, parking, gym; breakfast and service highly rated. Book on Trip.com or Accor.

name: Nongyue Emei Shanju Hostel
notes: Steps from Baoguo Temple at the foot of Mount Emei (~30 m from temple). Budget-friendly base for the summit hike; simple rooms, some nearby options have hot springs. Book on Trip.com or Booking.com.

name: Golden Summit Guesthouse
notes: Simple summit lodging near Huazang Temple on the Golden Summit. Worth booking early for sunrise access; expect cold nights, basic facilities and limited flexibility if weather turns.

name: YOHO River View Hotel (Hongya Cave Jiefangbei)
notes: High-rise river-view hotel on Minquan Road, Yuzhong (rooms on 45th+ floors). Floor-to-ceiling windows over Yangtze–Jialing confluence; 1 min walk to Jiaochangkou Metro (Lines 1 & 2). Book on Trip.com or Traveloka.

name: Wulingyuan Hotel
notes: About 200 m from Zhangjiajie National Forest Park ticket office; 35 min from airport/train station. 4-star, free parking, gym, Chinese and Western restaurant. Book on Trip.com or Booking.com.

name: Charming Inn Yangshuo
notes: On West Street in central Yangshuo, 5 min walk to bus station and Li River. Private and family rooms; staff can arrange cycling, kayaking and Li River trips. Book on Hostelworld or Booking.com.

name: The Bauhinia Serviced Apartments (Sheung Wan)
notes: 119–120 Connaught Road Central; studios and 1–2 bedroom units, harbour views, gym, laundry. Near Sheung Wan MTR. Book direct or via ResidenceHK / serviced-apartment sites.
